project.title: They Laughed When a Single Dad Poured Tilapia Into His Irrigation Ditches — Until the Dead Soil Came Back to Life
project.description: A widowed single father, Harlan Boone, pours two thousand live tilapia into the irrigation ditches of his dying south Georgia corn farm in 1974. Mocked by the whole county for three years, he quietly rebuilds his dead soil with fish waste — until a drought-year harvest number chalked at the county grain elevator silences every man who laughed.

style: photorealistic cinematic film still, 1970s rural Americana aesthetic, shot on grainy 35mm Kodak film stock, natural skin texture, soft depth of field
flashback_style: soft warm vignette, slightly faded colors, dreamy atmosphere

video_hook.video_style: photorealistic cinematic footage, 1970s rural Americana aesthetic, 35mm film look, natural motion, smooth stabilized camera

era.name: 1970s rural south Georgia
era.keywords: 1970s rural American South, weathered clapboard farmhouse, red Georgia dirt, old pickup trucks, corded rotary telephone, kerosene lantern, galvanized steel buckets, handwritten ledgers
era.wardrobe: 1970s American farm workwear, chambray and flannel work shirts, denim overalls, feed caps, worn leather work boots

characters.name: Harlan Boone
characters.description: 33-year-old lean weathered corn farmer, short dark brown hair, sun-lined face, faded blue chambray work shirt, worn indigo denim jeans, scuffed brown leather work boots

characters.name: Eli Boone (5-7 tuổi, 1974-1976)
characters.description: six-year-old boy, tousled sandy brown hair, wide serious eyes, faded red plaid flannel shirt, blue denim overalls, small scuffed brown boots

characters.name: Eli Boone (pajama — cảnh bếp sáng sớm)
characters.description: five-year-old boy, tousled sandy brown hair, wide serious eyes, faded blue striped cotton pajamas, bare feet

characters.name: Eli Boone (9 tuổi, 1978)
characters.description: nine-year-old boy, neat sandy brown hair, thoughtful steady expression, light blue chambray shirt, blue jeans, brown leather boots

characters.name: Eli Boone (12 tuổi, thập niên 1980)
characters.description: twelve-year-old boy, tall and lanky, short sandy brown hair, calm steady expression, gray-green cotton work shirt, blue jeans, black rubber boots

characters.name: Annie Boone (vợ đã mất — chỉ xuất hiện trong flashback)
characters.description: woman in her early thirties, soft chestnut brown hair pinned loosely back, warm patient face, powder blue 1970s cotton dress with chalk dust on the sleeve

characters.name: Ray (bạn hatchery ở Mississippi)
characters.description: burly hatchery man in his forties, ruddy weathered face, short salt-and-pepper hair, olive green work shirt with rolled sleeves, khaki canvas trousers, black rubber boots

characters.name: Earl Dobbins (nông dân hàng xóm)
characters.description: heavyset farmer in his fifties, gray stubble, deeply tanned face, beige feed cap, sweat-stained tan work shirt, blue denim overalls, worn brown boots

characters.name: Mr. Pruitt (cán bộ khuyến nông của hạt)
characters.description: county extension agent in his late forties, neatly combed graying brown hair, clean-shaven angular face, crisp white short-sleeve dress shirt, thin dark brown tie, gray slacks, wooden clipboard in hand

characters.name: Dale Kessler (nhân viên bán phân bón, 1974)
characters.description: fertilizer salesman in his early forties, slicked-back dark brown hair, confident easy smile, pressed light gray 1970s business suit, white dress shirt, polished black leather city shoes

characters.name: Dale Kessler (1978 — sa sút)
characters.description: fertilizer salesman in his mid-forties, slicked-back dark brown hair graying at the temples, tired lined face, rumpled light gray 1970s business suit, scuffed unpolished black leather shoes

characters.name: Dale Kessler (thăm farm Chủ nhật — áo plaid)
characters.description: fertilizer salesman in his mid-forties, dark brown hair graying at the temples, relaxed weathered face, red and gray plaid flannel shirt, dusty khaki trousers, plain brown leather shoes
